# Template

Task template for consistent execution.

## Trigger

When to use this template.

## Steps

1. **Understand** - Comprehend the requirement
2. **Plan** - Create solution approach
3. **Execute** - Implement solution
4. **Verify** - Check results
5. **Validate** - Ensure quality

## Criteria

| Criterion | Standard |
|-----------|----------|
| Code | Passes all gates |
| Tests | All passing |
| Docs | Updated |
